rows.label: qev025106_MSG0001
rows.name:
Uwooooooooooh!! Wh...
What on earth is this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0002
rows.name:
Why must I face something like
this... Damn it! Damn it! Why!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0003
rows.name:
Is it those Ma-non!? It must
be, this must be their doing!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0011
rows.name: Check the situation Gerome is in.

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0020
rows.name: Leave

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0021
rows.name: Leave Gerome behind and walk away.

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0004
rows.name:
Y... You!! You're the one
who was with that Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0005
rows.name:
I don't know either! I was
eating, and then suddenly I
was hit with sleepiness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hey! Don't abandon me!
At least hear me out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0007
rows.name:
I was just eating. Then suddenly
I was hit with sleepiness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0008
rows.name:
And when I woke up, I was here. With
this... handcuff bomb attached to me!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0030
rows.name: Trust

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0031
rows.name: Trust Gerome.

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0040
rows.name: Distrust

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not trust Gerome.

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ohh, you believe me! Thank you! I knew
you were different from that Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0010
rows.name:
What a suspicious guy you are... Why
would I tell such a stupid lie![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ugh... No matter if I'm a B.B., I
refuse to be blown to smithereens...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hey... Please... defuse
this bomb... Save me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0050
rows.name: Defuse

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0051
rows.name: Attempt to defuse the bomb.

rows.label: qev025106_JNK0060
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: qev025106_SEL0061
rows.name: Suggest to Gerome that evacuating to the lake might weaken the explosion.

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0013
rows.name: Gah! You useless bastard![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0014
rows.name:
Tch... Daaamn iiiiiiit! You
damn Ma-nooooooooooon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thank goodness... Do you have
knowledge about this bomb, then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0016
rows.name:
...What? You're knowledgeable about this
sort of thing? How reliable! Then I leave
my life entirely in your hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Ohh! You have quite the practiced
hands! Alright... That's good!
Keep dismantling the bomb![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0019
rows.name: Th... The bomb...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0020
rows.name:
It stopped...? Was the defusal
successful? Is my life saved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0021
rows.name: Ahh... Thank goodness... Guh... Ah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0024
rows.name:
...What? You've never seen or heard
of it before? Guh... But right now,
you're the only one I can rely on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0025
rows.name:
Just try doing what you think is
best... How is it... Does it seem
like you can manage something...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's not stopping...! Gah!
You useless bastard![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025106_MSG0029
rows.name:
Tch... Daaamn iiiiiiit! You
damn Ma-nooooooooooon![ST:wait ]
